title: Cuneiform Tablet #0577: Neo-Babylonian Ration List
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Babylonian period — a ration list document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Babylonian period. Ration List document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records ration list matters typical of Neo-Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
